HGSS.344.0000:
Do you know which is the cutest Pokémon
in the world?\r
It’s CHANSEY, of course!\r
I say CHANSEY, and that’s final!\f
HGSS.344.0001:
I will give you something good
if you can bring me a CHANSEY!
HGSS.344.0002:
That Pokémon is...CHANSEY!\f
What are the chances of
seeing CHANSEY this close?\f
Take this as a token of my gratitude!\f
HGSS.344.0003:
Let a CHANSEY hold this Lucky Punch,
and it’ll have a better chance at\r
getting critical hits!\f
Isn’t that awesome?!
HGSS.344.0005:
Do you know which is the cutest Pokémon
in the world?\r
It is CHANSEY, of course!\r
I say CHANSEY, and that’s final!
HGSS.344.0006:
Eusine: [0103,0000,0000]! Not again!
I’ll be there first next time!\f
Having followed it here, I’m
starting to understand what\r
SUICUNE is after.\f
To be honest, I would like to keep
this information to myself.\f
But I want to be an honest Trainer in
front of SUICUNE!\f
That’s why I am sharing a clue with you.
It seems that...\f
...SUICUNE prefers a hilly place
near water...\r
...Somewhere north.\f
I don’t know exactly where, yet.
It will be just you and me!\f
Who’ll find it first? I challenge you!
HGSS.344.0007:
Eusine: What’s wrong, [0103,0000,0000]?
To be honest, I would like to keep\r
this information to myself.\f
But I want to be an honest Trainer in
front of SUICUNE!\f
That’s why I am sharing a clue with you.\f
It seems that...
...SUICUNE prefers a hilly place\r
near water...\r
...Somewhere north.\f
I don’t know exactly where, yet.
It will be just you and me!
